ids.cutin_zh: 我们要继承特列斯大人的遗志！
ids.notes: name 5 cells, shares key words 继承/遗志 with cutin. トレーズさま=特列斯大人 per fleet convention (char_223); Treize already dead in the EW/Mariemaia era, so 意志=遗志. detail (didx 34) owned by char_410 - omitted.

barks.zh: 无法理解我们的理想……唯有排除！！
阁下遗志、我等必将实现！
人类迎来新觉醒！休想阻拦！
阁下的遗志……达成前绝不倒下！！
誓死守护玛莉梅亚大人！！
这、这点程度！胜者是我们！！
呜哇！怎么会！！敌人是高达！？
人唯有战斗才美丽！至死绝不停止抵抗！
别抵抗！服从玛莉梅亚大人！

notes: Generic Treize-faction rank-and-file (= Mariemaia Army remnant soldiers, 高达W Endless Waltz). Terms per fleet: 特列斯/特列斯阁下(閣下)/特列斯大人(さま), 玛莉梅亚 (consistent with char_153/223 and sibling brief char_468); Treize creed 人は戦ってこそ美しい rendered 人唯有战斗才美丽 (community wording, pixiv dic), stem-consistent with char_468's 人唯有战斗才美/战斗即意义. Fixes vs old ZH: restored dropped JP nuances - ……and だけ in 0x357EC (唯有排除), 閣下 honorific in 0x3589C/0x35924, 我々の手で in 0x35848 (亲手), これしき stutter in 0x3598C (这、这点程度), むざむざ in 0x35A74 (白白被夺), てみせる resolve (必将实现/誓死守护); 0x358E8 is a dying murmur - old ZH wrongly ended ！, restored trailing ……; JP-matching ！！ restored in 0x3594C/0x35A98; oversized single ！！ trimmed to JP's single ！ in 0x359D8/0x35A08. Budget-forced compressions (ideal fuller lines): 0x35848 未来由我们亲手开创！！; 0x35868 我等玛莉梅亚的士兵在此奋起！(kept name+action as 玛莉梅亚军、上！); 0x35884 为了玛莉梅亚大人！！(name-shout only fits); 0x3589C 特列斯阁下的遗志、由我等来实现！; 0x358C0 人类将迎来新的觉醒！休想阻拦！; 0x358E8 特、特列斯大人……我这就去您身边……; 0x3590C 别小看玛莉梅亚的士兵！; 0x359D8 stutter ひ、dropped. 0x35A20 kept byte-identical to current 来了！回避！(real encoded size 7B within budget 9; the brief cost approximation scores it 10 and every strict-rule alternative degrades the line).
